Working at the on-campus counseling center

January 2, 2021

Starting this January, I’m working at the on-campus counseling center at Seoul National University, “Center for Campus Life & Culture”.
As a graduate student majoring in clinical psychology, this would be a great opportunity to experience real clinical settings, and apply what I learned in lectures so far.
From January to June, I’ll be doing the intake interview every week :)
I’m also going conduct some 1:1 counseling sessions!

As a practice counselor, I hope I could learn a lot and be a helpful counselor to my future clients!
